tasks.label: Validate JavaScript (check for errors)
tasks.command: node -e "var fs=require('fs');var src=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');var blocks=src.match(/<script[\s\S]*?<\/script>/g)||[];var ok=0;blocks.forEach(function(b){try{new Function(b.replace(/<\/?script[^>]*>/g,''));ok++;}catch(e){console.error('JS ERROR:',e.message);}});console.log('Checked '+ok+' script block(s) — no syntax errors found.');"

tasks.label: Push to GitHub Pages (publish live)
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'update site' && git push

tasks.label: Check image folder sizes
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem images -Recurse -Include *.jpg,*.jpeg,*.png,*.webp | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round($_.Length/1KB,1)}} | Sort-Object KB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize
